title: Cholargos metro station
summary: Cholargos (Greek: Χολαργός), also known as Holargos on signage, is a station on Athens Metro Line 3, located 22 metres below Mesogeion Avenue. The station opened on 23 July 2010.
text:
Cholargos (Greek: Χολαργός), also known as Holargos on signage, is a station on Athens Metro Line 3, located 22 metres below Mesogeion Avenue. The station opened on 23 July 2010.

Station layout
